meaning: n.面板,嵌板,仪表板,座谈小组,全体陪审员vt.嵌镶板
examples: He assembled a panel of scholars to advise him.
The last question foxed even our panel of experts.
Frances decided to conceal the machine behind a hinged panel.
The Proficient MaxTV is uniquely designed to bring high fidelity audio performance to flat panel TVs.
It will commission a panel to look into why we failed to anticipate the threat.
